policy_name: Heartland Spirits LLC Employee Expense & Reimbursement Policy

validation_rules.notes: Requires pre-approval from Jacob Graves before submission
Janet Kowalski accepts only one valid receipt per charge

validation_rules.requirement: Grain, barrel, glassware, or supply purchases
validation_rules.notes: Match against PO and bank statement before reimbursement
Policy violation; contact bookkeeper Janet Kowalski for exceptions

context: Expense and reimbursement validation rules for Heartland Spirits LLC distillery staff. Charges over $200 require approval from owner Jacob Graves; all submissions are processed by bookkeeper Janet Kowalski.
